units.source_text: 1 The total ECL is recognised in the loss allowance for the financial asset unless the total ECL exceeds the gross carrying amount of the financial asset, in which case the ECL is recognised as a provision.
units.translation_target_text: 1 预期信用损失总额计入金融资产的损失准备，除非预期信用损失总额超过金融资产的账面总额，在此情况下，预期信用损失确认为拨备。

units.source_text: The following table provides an overview of the Group’s credit risk by stage and industry, and the associated ECL coverage. The financial assets recorded in each stage have the following characteristics:
units.translation_target_text: 下表概述了本集团按阶段和行业划分的信用风险以及相关的预期信用损失覆盖范围。各阶段记录的金融资产具有以下特征：
units.translation_zh: 下表概述了本集团按阶段和行业划分的信用风险以及相关的预期信用损失覆盖范围。各阶段记录的金融资产具有以下特征：

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_zh: 下表概述了本集团按阶段和行业划分的信用风险以及相关的预期信用损失覆盖范围。各阶段记录的金融资产具有以下特征：

units.source_text: Stage 1: These financial assets are unimpaired and without a significant increase in credit risk for which a 12-month allowance for ECL is recognised.
units.translation_target_text: 第一阶段：这些金融资产未发生减值，信用风险未显着增加，并确认 12 个月的预期信用损失准备金。
units.translation_zh: 第一阶段：这些金融资产未发生减值，信用风险未显着增加，并确认 12 个月的预期信用损失准备金。

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_zh: 第一阶段：这些金融资产未发生减值，信用风险未显着增加，并确认 12 个月的预期信用损失准备金。

units.source_text: Stage 2: A significant increase in credit risk has been experienced on these financial assets since initial recognition for which a lifetime ECL is recognised.
units.translation_target_text: 第二阶段：自初始确认以来，这些金融资产的信用风险已显着增加，并确认了终身预期信用损失。 (2)
units.translation_zh: 第二阶段：自初始确认以来，这些金融资产的信用风险已显着增加，并确认了终身预期信用损失。 (2)

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_zh: 第二阶段：自初始确认以来，这些金融资产的信用风险已显着增加，并确认了终身预期信用损失。 (2)

units.source_text: Stage 3: There is objective evidence of impairment and the financial assets are therefore considered to be in default or otherwise credit impaired for which a lifetime ECL is recognised.
units.translation_target_text: 第三阶段：存在减值的客观证据，因此金融资产被视为违约或其他信用减值，并确认整个存续期预期信用损失。 (3)
units.translation_zh: 第三阶段：存在减值的客观证据，因此金融资产被视为违约或其他信用减值，并确认整个存续期预期信用损失。 (3)

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_zh: 第三阶段：存在减值的客观证据，因此金融资产被视为违约或其他信用减值，并确认整个存续期预期信用损失。 (3)

units.source_text: Purchased or originated credit-impaired financial assets (‘POCI’): Financial assets that are purchased or originated at a deep discount are seen to reflect the incurred credit losses on which a lifetime ECL is
units.translation_target_text: 购买或产生的信用减值金融资产（“POCI”）：以大幅折扣购买或产生的金融资产被认为反映了已发生的信用损失，而终身预期信用损失
units.translation_zh: 购买或产生的信用减值金融资产（“POCI”）：以大幅折扣购买或产生的金融资产被认为反映了已发生的信用损失，而终身预期信用损失

units.source_text: Unless identified at an earlier stage, all financial assets are deemed to have suffered a significant increase in credit risk when they are 30 days past due (‘DPD’) and are transferred from stage 1 to stage 2. The following
units.translation_target_text: 除非在早期阶段进行识别，否则所有金融资产在逾期 30 天（“DPD”）时均被视为信用风险显着增加，并从第 1 阶段转移到第 2 阶段。
units.translation_zh: 除非在早期阶段进行识别，否则所有金融资产在逾期 30 天（“DPD”）时均被视为信用风险显着增加，并从第 1 阶段转移到第 2 阶段。

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence
